zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Mons於大約1150年出生在比利時海瑙特蒙斯時，她的父親Gossuin de Mons III32歲，母親Beatrice Rumigny27歲。她於大約1170年與Wautier I de Ligne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1229年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Mons于大约1150年出生在比利时海瑙特蒙斯时，她的父亲Gossuin de Mons III32岁，母亲Beatrice Rumigny27岁。她于大约1170年与Wautier I de Ligne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1229年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain.  Spanish Consuelo, Juan, Orestes, Valeria.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Mons.
Catalan: topographic name from the plural of mont ‘mountain’.

variants.name: Mantz
meanings: German: variant of   Manz   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Mons was born about 1150, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Gossuin de Mons III, was 32 and her mother, Beatrice Rumigny, was 27. She married Wautier I de Ligne about 1170. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1229.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Mons est née environ 1150, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Gossuin de Mons III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Rumigny, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Wautier I de Ligne environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1229.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Mons um 1150 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gossuin de Mons III 32 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Rumigny 27. Sie hat um 1170 Wautier I de Ligne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1229.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Mons è nata il circa 1150 nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Gossuin de Mons III, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Rumigny, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Wautier I de Ligne circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1229.

ja.Mons, Hainaut, Belgium: ベルギーヘイナトモンス
ja.Havré, Hainaut, Belgique: ベルギーヘイナトハvルe
ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Monsが約1150年にベルギーヘイナトモンスで生まれた時，父Gossuin de Mons IIIは32歳，母Beatrice Rumignyは27歳であった。約1170年にWautier I de Ligneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1229年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Mons(이)가 대략 1150년 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gossuin de Mons III(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Rumigny(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 Wautier I de Ligne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1229년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Mons nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Gossuin de Mons III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Rumigny, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Wautier I de Ligne aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1229.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Mons родилась около 1150 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Gossuin de Mons III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Rumigny, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wautier I de Ligne около 1170 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1229 г.

sm.about 1150–after 1229: e tusa o le 1150–ina ua ma'ea le 1229

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Mons nació aproximadamente 1150, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Gossuin de Mons III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrice Rumigny, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Wautier I de Ligne aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1229.
